headline: Robinhood To Rally Around 27%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Monday
summary: Top analysts change outlook on top names: Truist cut Doximity's price target, Stifel raised Plexus's, Needham raised Cadence's, Mizuho slashed Skyworks'. HC Wainwright raised Adlai's, B of A Securities raised Corning's, Baird raised Autoliv's & Mizuho raised Robinhood's. See all analyst rating changes.

headline: Mizuho Downgrades Skyworks Solutions to Underperform, Lowers Price Target to $46
summary: Mizuho  analyst Vijay Rakesh   downgrades Skyworks Solutions (NASDAQ:SWKS) from Neutral to Underperform and lowers the price target from $60 to $46.
